case_for: Rodgers has posted 15+ points in three of his last four games and the projection sits well above the 12-point threshold, suggesting a strong floor from volume passing in a Jets offense leaning on his arm.
case_against: His week 1 zero-point outlier shows the bust potential if an early exit or shutdown game occurs, and his recent scores have been volatile (0.0 to 21.0), making a sub-12 outcome plausible.
